meta.name: experiment-ontology
meta.description: Performance-measurement experiment KB: Run/Outcome materialized v0; Score materialized (D-05/D-06); Route/Step/Decision/Report schema-only stubs; Experiment optional grouping.

Experiment.description: An OPTIONAL named grouping of Runs (e.g. 'opus-vs-haiku-refactor-sweep'). Not required to write a Run (D-04); populated lazily.

Run.description: A single coding-agent task run, materialized at close. The queryable unit (D2). Carries 8 tags sourced from token_usage + span.

taskId.description: Measurement span task_id (idempotency key; stored also as metadata.task_id)

specLevel.description: Spec level (deferred — written null this phase)

pending.description: Quarantine flag — excluded from queries until classified (D-06)

Route.description: The sequence of steps a Run took (schema-only stub; populated Phase 72).

Step.description: One step in a Route (schema-only stub; Phase 72).

Decision.description: A decision point within a Step (schema-only stub; Phase 73).

Outcome.description: Run result. v0 stub: token totals + closed-state only (D-12). No route/score (Phases 72-73).

totalTokens.description: Sum of total_tokens for the Run's task_id

Score.description: Semantic scoring of a Run: goal_aligned_ratio + 5-dim judged rubric + corrected_* overrides (D-05/D-06). corrected_*/overridden_by/overridden_at ride in metadata (not declared properties).

goalAlignedRatio.description: toward/(toward+away) over consequential events (D-02); judged; null when no evidence

goalAchieved.description: 0-1 rubric dimension; judged; null when no evidence (D-01)

codeQuality.description: 0-1 rubric dimension; judged; null when no evidence (D-01)

testCoverage.description: 0-1 rubric dimension; judged; null when no evidence (D-01)

regressions.description: 0|1 rubric dimension; judged; null when no evidence (D-01)

specDrift.description: 0-1 rubric dimension; judged; null when no evidence (D-01)

Report.description: Saved query + stable results snapshot (schema-only stub; Phase 74 KB-04).
